proposed_hypotheses.text: Patients receiving `treatment_pembrolizumab` have higher mean `pfs_months` than patients not receiving `treatment_pembrolizumab`.
Patients receiving `treatment_sotorasib` have higher mean `pfs_months` than patients not receiving `treatment_sotorasib`.
Patients receiving `treatment_olaparib` have higher mean `pfs_months` than patients not receiving `treatment_olaparib`.
Patients receiving `treatment_osimertinib` have higher mean `pfs_months` than patients not receiving `treatment_osimertinib`.

analyses.code: OLS pfs_months ~ four treatment indicators
analyses.result_summary: treatment_pembrolizumab: effect -0.035 months, SE 0.020, z -1.74, p=0.0812.

analyses.code: OLS pfs_months ~ four treatment indicators
analyses.result_summary: treatment_sotorasib: effect 0.322 months, SE 0.021, z 15.42, p=<1e-300.

analyses.code: OLS pfs_months ~ four treatment indicators
analyses.result_summary: treatment_olaparib: effect -0.025 months, SE 0.022, z -1.15, p=0.2510.

analyses.code: OLS pfs_months ~ four treatment indicators
analyses.result_summary: treatment_osimertinib: effect 0.006 months, SE 0.022, z 0.29, p=0.7717.

proposed_hypotheses.text: Higher `pdl1_tps` is associated with higher `pfs_months`, with each 0.1-unit increase in `pdl1_tps` increasing progression-free survival.
Patients with `tmb_high` have lower `pfs_months` than patients without `tmb_high` after adjustment for clinical features, biomarkers, and treatments.

analyses.code: Adjusted OLS pfs_months ~ clinical covariates + biomarkers + treatments
analyses.result_summary: pdl1_tps: effect 0.001 months, SE 0.002, z 0.38, p=0.7018.

analyses.code: Adjusted OLS pfs_months ~ clinical covariates + biomarkers + treatments
analyses.result_summary: tmb_high: effect -0.005 months, SE 0.007, z -0.70, p=0.4817.

proposed_hypotheses.text: The positive association between `treatment_pembrolizumab` and `pfs_months` is stronger at higher `pdl1_tps`; the interaction `treatment_pembrolizumab` by `pdl1_tps` is positive.
The positive association between `treatment_pembrolizumab` and `pfs_months` is stronger in patients with `tmb_high`; the interaction `treatment_pembrolizumab` by `tmb_high` is positive.

analyses.code: Adjusted OLS with pembrolizumab*PD-L1 and pembrolizumab*TMB interactions
analyses.result_summary: treatment_pembrolizumab:pdl1_tps_per_0_1: effect 0.001 months, SE 0.003, z 0.30, p=0.7673.

analyses.code: Adjusted OLS with pembrolizumab*PD-L1 and pembrolizumab*TMB interactions
analyses.result_summary: treatment_pembrolizumab:tmb_high: effect -0.005 months, SE 0.014, z -0.37, p=0.7144.

proposed_hypotheses.text: Patients with `stk11_mutation` have lower `pfs_months` than patients without `stk11_mutation` after adjustment.
`stk11_mutation` attenuates pembrolizumab benefit; the interaction `treatment_pembrolizumab` by `stk11_mutation` is negative.

analyses.code: Adjusted OLS with STK11 main effect and pembrolizumab*STK11 interaction
analyses.result_summary: stk11_mutation: effect -0.014 months, SE 0.013, z -1.09, p=0.2771.

analyses.code: Adjusted OLS with STK11 main effect and pembrolizumab*STK11 interaction
analyses.result_summary: treatment_pembrolizumab:stk11_mutation: effect -0.010 months, SE 0.018, z -0.56, p=0.5724.

proposed_hypotheses.text: Among patients with `kras_g12c`, `treatment_sotorasib` is associated with higher `pfs_months` than no `treatment_sotorasib`.
The interaction between `treatment_sotorasib` and `kras_g12c` is positive for `pfs_months`.

analyses.code: Adjusted OLS with sotorasib*KRAS G12C interaction
analyses.result_summary: treatment_sotorasib:kras_g12c: effect 2.535 months, SE 0.017, z 149.15, p=<1e-300.

analyses.code: Welch comparison within kras_g12c=1
analyses.result_summary: Among KRAS G12C patients, mean PFS was 5.77 months with sotorasib (n=2246) vs 3.21 without (n=4122); difference 2.552 months, p=<1e-300.

proposed_hypotheses.text: `stk11_mutation` reduces the `treatment_sotorasib` benefit in `kras_g12c` patients; the three-way contrast of sotorasib benefit in KRAS G12C/STK11-mutant versus KRAS G12C/STK11-wild-type disease is negative.

analyses.code: Adjusted OLS within kras_g12c=1 with sotorasib*STK11 interaction
analyses.result_summary: treatment_sotorasib:stk11_mutation: effect -0.138 months, SE 0.097, z -1.43, p=0.1538.

proposed_hypotheses.text: Patients with `egfr_mutation` have higher `pfs_months` when receiving `treatment_osimertinib`, so the interaction `treatment_osimertinib` by `egfr_mutation` is positive.
Among patients with `egfr_mutation`, `treatment_osimertinib` is associated with higher `pfs_months` than no `treatment_osimertinib`.

analyses.code: Adjusted OLS with osimertinib*EGFR interaction
analyses.result_summary: treatment_osimertinib:egfr_mutation: effect -0.021 months, SE 0.021, z -1.01, p=0.3145.

analyses.code: Welch comparison within egfr_mutation=1
analyses.result_summary: Among EGFR-mutant patients, mean PFS was 3.59 months with osimertinib (n=1973) vs 3.60 without (n=4544); difference -0.014 months, p=0.8081.

proposed_hypotheses.text: In patients with `egfr_mutation`, the `treatment_osimertinib` benefit is smaller when `has_brain_mets` is 1 than when `has_brain_mets` is 0.

analyses.code: Adjusted OLS within egfr_mutation=1 with osimertinib*brain metastases interaction
analyses.result_summary: treatment_osimertinib:has_brain_mets: effect 0.015 months, SE 0.036, z 0.41, p=0.6788.

proposed_hypotheses.text: Patients with `brca2_mutation` have higher `pfs_months` when receiving `treatment_olaparib`, so the interaction `treatment_olaparib` by `brca2_mutation` is positive.
Among patients with `brca2_mutation`, `treatment_olaparib` is associated with higher `pfs_months` than no `treatment_olaparib`.

analyses.code: Adjusted OLS with olaparib*BRCA2 interaction
analyses.result_summary: treatment_olaparib:brca2_mutation: effect -0.007 months, SE 0.042, z -0.16, p=0.8763.

analyses.code: Welch comparison within brca2_mutation=1
analyses.result_summary: Among BRCA2-mutant patients, mean PFS was 3.32 months with olaparib (n=417) vs 3.31 without (n=1102); difference 0.010 months, p=0.9337.

proposed_hypotheses.text: `alk_fusion` is associated with higher `pfs_months` than no `alk_fusion` after adjustment for clinical features and treatments.
`ros1_fusion` is associated with higher `pfs_months` than no `ros1_fusion` after adjustment for clinical features and treatments.

analyses.code: Adjusted OLS with driver biomarkers and treatments
analyses.result_summary: alk_fusion: effect -0.029 months, SE 0.015, z -1.88, p=0.0598.

analyses.code: Adjusted OLS with driver biomarkers and treatments
analyses.result_summary: ros1_fusion: effect -0.004 months, SE 0.034, z -0.13, p=0.8987.

proposed_hypotheses.text: `met_exon14_skipping` is associated with lower `pfs_months` than no `met_exon14_skipping` after adjustment.
`her2_amplification` is associated with lower `pfs_months` than no `her2_amplification` after adjustment.

analyses.code: Adjusted OLS with driver biomarkers and treatments
analyses.result_summary: met_exon14_skipping: effect 0.017 months, SE 0.019, z 0.87, p=0.3830.

analyses.code: Adjusted OLS with driver biomarkers and treatments
analyses.result_summary: her2_amplification: effect 0.014 months, SE 0.019, z 0.71, p=0.4795.

proposed_hypotheses.text: `ret_fusion` is associated with higher `pfs_months` than no `ret_fusion` after adjustment.
`egfr_mutation` has an overall positive adjusted association with `pfs_months` after accounting for treatment and other biomarkers.

analyses.code: Adjusted OLS with driver biomarkers and treatments
analyses.result_summary: ret_fusion: effect -0.002 months, SE 0.023, z -0.08, p=0.9392.

analyses.code: Adjusted OLS with driver biomarkers and treatments
analyses.result_summary: egfr_mutation: effect -0.000 months, SE 0.011, z -0.03, p=0.9761.

proposed_hypotheses.text: Each 10-year increase in `age_years` is associated with higher `pfs_months` after adjustment.
Patients with `sex_female` equal to 1 have lower `pfs_months` than patients with `sex_female` equal to 0 after adjustment.
Higher `ecog_ps` is associated with lower `pfs_months`; each one-point increase in `ecog_ps` decreases progression-free survival.
`stage_iv` is associated with lower `pfs_months` than non-stage-IV disease after adjustment.

analyses.code: Adjusted OLS with clinical covariates, biomarkers, and treatments
analyses.result_summary: age_years: effect 1.684 months, SE 0.003, z 511.72, p=<1e-300.

analyses.code: Adjusted OLS with clinical covariates, biomarkers, and treatments
analyses.result_summary: sex_female: effect -0.203 months, SE 0.007, z -31.09, p=<1e-300.

analyses.code: Adjusted OLS with clinical covariates, biomarkers, and treatments
analyses.result_summary: ecog_ps: effect -1.101 months, SE 0.005, z -229.62, p=<1e-300.

analyses.code: Adjusted OLS with clinical covariates, biomarkers, and treatments
analyses.result_summary: stage_iv: effect -1.417 months, SE 0.007, z -208.07, p=<1e-300.

proposed_hypotheses.text: `has_brain_mets` is associated with lower `pfs_months` after adjustment.
`liver_mets` is associated with lower `pfs_months` after adjustment.

analyses.code: Adjusted OLS with clinical covariates, biomarkers, and treatments
analyses.result_summary: has_brain_mets: effect -0.912 months, SE 0.007, z -121.67, p=<1e-300.

analyses.code: Adjusted OLS with clinical covariates, biomarkers, and treatments
analyses.result_summary: liver_mets: effect -0.005 months, SE 0.009, z -0.52, p=0.6041.

proposed_hypotheses.text: `bone_mets` is associated with lower `pfs_months` after adjustment.
Higher `weight_loss_pct_6mo` is associated with lower `pfs_months`; each 5 percentage-point increase decreases progression-free survival.

analyses.code: Adjusted OLS with clinical covariates, biomarkers, and treatments
analyses.result_summary: bone_mets: effect -0.008 months, SE 0.008, z -0.93, p=0.3512.

analyses.code: Adjusted OLS with clinical covariates, biomarkers, and treatments
analyses.result_summary: weight_loss_pct_6mo: effect -0.366 months, SE 0.004, z -87.07, p=<1e-300.

proposed_hypotheses.text: Higher `albumin_g_dl` is associated with higher `pfs_months` after adjustment.
Higher `ldh_u_l` is associated with lower `pfs_months`; each 100 U/L increase decreases progression-free survival.

analyses.code: Adjusted OLS with clinical covariates, biomarkers, and treatments
analyses.result_summary: albumin_g_dl: effect 0.463 months, SE 0.006, z 71.33, p=<1e-300.

analyses.code: Adjusted OLS with clinical covariates, biomarkers, and treatments
analyses.result_summary: ldh_u_l: effect -0.045 months, SE 0.004, z -11.09, p=<1e-300.

proposed_hypotheses.text: Higher `crp_mg_l` is associated with lower `pfs_months`; each 10 mg/L increase decreases progression-free survival.
Higher `nlr` is associated with lower `pfs_months` after adjustment.

analyses.code: Adjusted OLS with clinical covariates, biomarkers, and treatments
analyses.result_summary: crp_mg_l: effect 0.002 months, SE 0.004, z 0.58, p=0.5588.

analyses.code: Adjusted OLS with clinical covariates, biomarkers, and treatments
analyses.result_summary: nlr: effect -0.000 months, SE 0.002, z -0.06, p=0.9561.

proposed_hypotheses.text: `squamous` `histology` is associated with lower `pfs_months` than adenocarcinoma after adjustment.
Current `smoking_status` is associated with lower `pfs_months` than never smoking after adjustment.

proposed_hypotheses.text: Higher `hemoglobin_g_dl` is associated with higher `pfs_months` after adjustment.
Higher `alkaline_phosphatase_u_l` is associated with lower `pfs_months`; each 100 U/L increase decreases progression-free survival.

analyses.result_summary: alkaline_phosphatase_u_l: effect -0.005 months, SE 0.007, z -0.72, p=0.4733.

proposed_hypotheses.text: Higher `sodium_meq_l` is associated with higher `pfs_months` after adjustment.
Higher `calcium_mg_dl` is associated with lower `pfs_months` after adjustment.

proposed_hypotheses.text: `copd` is associated with lower `pfs_months` than no `copd` after adjustment.
`chronic_kidney_disease` is associated with lower `pfs_months` than no `chronic_kidney_disease` after adjustment.

analyses.result_summary: chronic_kidney_disease: effect -0.003 months, SE 0.010, z -0.29, p=0.7733.

proposed_hypotheses.text: `autoimmune_disease` attenuates pembrolizumab benefit; the interaction `treatment_pembrolizumab` by `autoimmune_disease` is negative.

analyses.code: Adjusted OLS with pembrolizumab*autoimmune_disease interaction
analyses.result_summary: treatment_pembrolizumab:autoimmune_disease: effect 0.027 months, SE 0.030, z 0.89, p=0.3723.

proposed_hypotheses.text: `interstitial_lung_disease_history` is associated with lower `pfs_months` after adjustment.
`heart_failure` is associated with lower `pfs_months` after adjustment.

analyses.code: Adjusted OLS adding comorbidity indicators
analyses.result_summary: interstitial_lung_disease_history: effect -0.016 months, SE 0.017, z -0.95, p=0.3426.

analyses.code: Adjusted OLS adding comorbidity indicators
analyses.result_summary: heart_failure: effect -0.029 months, SE 0.011, z -2.67, p=0.0077.

proposed_hypotheses.text: The `treatment_pembrolizumab` benefit is larger when `pdl1_tps` is above the cohort median (0.3) than when `pdl1_tps` is at or below the cohort median.

analyses.code: Adjusted OLS with pembrolizumab*above-median PD-L1 interaction
analyses.result_summary: treatment_pembrolizumab:pdl1_tps_above_median: effect 0.013 months, SE 0.013, z 1.01, p=0.3102.

proposed_hypotheses.text: In the biomarker-selected subgroup (`egfr_mutation`, `kras_g12c`, or `brca2_mutation`), matched targeted therapy (`treatment_osimertinib` for EGFR, `treatment_sotorasib` for KRAS G12C, or `treatment_olaparib` for BRCA2) is associated with higher `pfs_months` than not receiving a matched targeted therapy.

analyses.code: Adjusted OLS within EGFR/KRAS G12C/BRCA2 biomarker-positive patients using matched targeted therapy indicator
analyses.result_summary: matched_targeted_therapy: effect 1.209 months, SE 0.021, z 57.92, p=<1e-300.
